name: TypeScript
depth_note: End-to-end type safety across the monorepo — fewer production bugs, lower maintenance cost.

name: Python
depth_note: AI/agent workflows and data tooling — rapid prototyping that turns ideas into automation.

name: Astro
depth_note: Content-driven sites shipped as static HTML — fast loads and near-zero hosting cost.

name: React
depth_note: Interactive islands only where needed — rich UX without bloating the page weight.

name: Tailwind CSS
depth_note: A consistent design system at speed — UI changes ship in minutes, not days.

name: Node.js
depth_note: Build-time pipelines and CLIs — one content source feeds every static surface.

name: SQLite
depth_note: A single build artifact powers every site — no runtime database to operate or pay for.

name: Drizzle ORM
depth_note: Schema-first, type-safe data access — migrations stay reviewable and safe to ship.

name: Docker
depth_note: Reproducible environments — onboarding and deploys without "works on my machine".

name: GitHub Actions
depth_note: Automated sync, ingest and deploy — every release is push-button and repeatable.

name: AWS
depth_note: Static hosting and serverless — scales on demand while you pay only for usage.
